title: Visual Tunes
description: This is Visual Tunes! a pack that aims to enhance the feel of Minecraft's Music Discs & Jukebox texture's with a simple change.
body:
Introducing Visual Tunes! a pack that aims to improve the overall textures of the jukebox and music discs to make them more enjoyable to find, and make the Minecraft music disc experience more exciting when listening to your favorite song! 


 
![Tuning In!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83a8f7abefda74fa60f503c3d871244718056d9c.png)
**Time to Jam!**

---
I felt like the enjoyment of finding music discs and listening to them wasn't all there. so I changed some things to make it more enjoyable!

Wanna listen to some tunes?, this pack provides:
- New Jukebox & Disc Textures with more to come if any new disc is added!

**Updated Music Discs Textures as of 1.21.7! pack v2.0.4:** ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df5e9227f07ad5c18d36a4c9e162c8b203bf61dd.png)


**Disclaimer:**
- plans to make each music disc show in the jukebox are not planned at the moment, as i have currently not found a way to do so.

# found a bug to report?
- I currently do not have a server or anything in that field for bugs to be reported, for the time being this is where you should report any bugs for this resourcepack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/visual-tunes/

a server about my texture packs have not been made. however, plans to do so with an upcoming large scale pack in the future is being considered!

with that being said!

**what are you waiting for?, go listen to some music thats even more enjoyable!**
